title: The Bullet Journal Method
author: Ryder Carroll
subline: Track the past. Order the present. Design the future.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A giant open notebook page with hand-drawn bullet symbols. The four core bullets: TASK (•) EVENT (○) NOTE (—) and the SIGNIFIER (*) marked RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1200)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- The page: a 900x900 wireframe with paper dots (grid background) -->
    <rect x="-450" y="-450" width="900" height="900" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Dot grid: small ash dots every 50px -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">
      <!-- Simplified: 17x17 dots -->
      <g>
        <circle cx="-400" cy="-400" r="2"/><circle cx="-300" cy="-400" r="2"/><circle cx="-200" cy="-400" r="2"/><circle cx="-100" cy="-400" r="2"/><circle cx="0" cy="-400" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="-400" r="2"/><circle cx="200" cy="-400" r="2"/><circle cx="300" cy="-400" r="2"/>
        <circle cx="-400" cy="-300" r="2"/><circle cx="-300" cy="-300" r="2"/><circle cx="-200" cy="-300" r="2"/><circle cx="-100" cy="-300" r="2"/><circle cx="0" cy="-300" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="-300" r="2"/><circle cx="200" cy="-300" r="2"/><circle cx="300" cy="-300" r="2"/>
        <circle cx="-400" cy="-200" r="2"/><circle cx="-300" cy="-200" r="2"/><circle cx="-200" cy="-200" r="2"/><circle cx="-100" cy="-200" r="2"/><circle cx="0" cy="-200" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="-200" r="2"/><circle cx="200" cy="-200" r="2"/><circle cx="300" cy="-200" r="2"/>
        <circle cx="-400" cy="-100" r="2"/><circle cx="-300" cy="-100" r="2"/><circle cx="-200" cy="-100" r="2"/><circle cx="-100" cy="-100" r="2"/><circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="-100" r="2"/><circle cx="200" cy="-100" r="2"/><circle cx="300" cy="-100" r="2"/>
        <circle cx="-400" cy="0" r="2"/><circle cx="-300" cy="0" r="2"/><circle cx="-200" cy="0" r="2"/><circle cx="-100" cy="0" r="2"/><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="0" r="2"/><circle cx="200" cy="0" r="2"/><circle cx="300" cy="0" r="2"/>
        <circle cx="-400" cy="100" r="2"/><circle cx="-300" cy="100" r="2"/><circle cx="-200" cy="100" r="2"/><circle cx="-100" cy="100" r="2"/><circle cx="0" cy="100" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="100" r="2"/><circle cx="200" cy="100" r="2"/><circle cx="300" cy="100" r="2"/>
        <circle cx="-400" cy="200" r="2"/><circle cx="-300" cy="200" r="2"/><circle cx="-200" cy="200" r="2"/><circle cx="-100" cy="200" r="2"/><circle cx="0" cy="200" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="200" r="2"/><circle cx="200" cy="200" r="2"/><circle cx="300" cy="200" r="2"/>
        <circle cx="-400" cy="300" r="2"/><circle cx="-300" cy="300" r="2"/><circle cx="-200" cy="300" r="2"/><circle cx="-100" cy="300" r="2"/><circle cx="0" cy="300" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="300" r="2"/><circle cx="200" cy="300" r="2"/><circle cx="300" cy="300" r="2"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- The 4 bullets, in a row, each labeled -->
    <g transform="translate(0 -200)" font-size="120" font-weight="500" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="-300" y="0" fill="#cccccc">•</text>
      <text x="-100" y="0" fill="#cccccc">○</text>
      <text x="100" y="0" fill="#cccccc">—</text>
      <text x="300" y="0" fill="#fc1c46">✱</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Labels under each -->
    <g font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="-300" y="-100" fill="#cccccc">TASK</text>
      <text x="-100" y="-100" fill="#cccccc">EVENT</text>
      <text x="100" y="-100" fill="#cccccc">NOTE</text>
      <text x="300" y="-100" fill="#fc1c46">SIGNIFIER</text>
    </g>
    <!-- A few lines of rapid-log style content below -->
    <g font-size="20" font-weight="400" fill="#cccccc">
      <text x="-400" y="40">• Send invoice</text>
      <text x="-400" y="100" fill="#fc1c46">✱ Launch beta</text>
      <text x="-400" y="160">○ Investor call · 3pm</text>
      <text x="-400" y="220">— Idea: simplify signup</text>
      <text x="-400" y="280" fill="#4c4c4c">× Reply to Marcus</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: An open dot-grid notebook page with the four bullet symbols (•, ○, —, ✱) in a row, ✱ (signifier) in RED. A few lines of sample rapid-log entries below. 220px whisper title at the bottom — the page IS the cover.
